message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #000000
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #000000
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  BoxBorderColor #000000
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ArrowColor #000000
  ArrowThickness 2
  ParticipantPadding 30
  BoxPadding 10
}

participant "Digdag" as Digdag
participant "Slack" as Slack
participant "DB" as DB
participant "Solr" as Solr

== Slack ==
Digdag -> Slack : 開始通知
Slack -> Digdag

== extract database ==
Digdag -> DB : abc
DB -> Digdag : def

== index ==
Digdag -> Solr : index.sh
Solr -> Digdag

== Slack ==
Digdag -> Slack : 終了通知
Slack -> Digdag

@enduml
